cases.title: Logged-out user is blocked from private resume analyzer
cases.expected: Logged-out user is redirected or blocked safely.

cases.title: Authenticated user can access private resume analyzer
cases.expected: Authenticated user can access the private analyzer experience.

cases.title: Stale session is handled safely
cases.expected: Stale session does not allow unauthorized access or corrupt state.
